# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: flask-api
  labels:
    app: flask-api
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: flask-api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: flask-api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: flask-api
        image: your-docker-repo/flask-api:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5000
        env:
        - name: FLASK_ENV
          value: production
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1000
          runAsGroup: 3000
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
              - ALL
      imagePullSecrets:
      - name: regcred
